mapper.select: SELECT a.id AS applyId, v.id AS visitId, a.subject AS title, a.visitor_company AS unit, a.status AS status, a.start_time AS startTime, a.end_time AS endTime, a.visitor_count AS headCount, v.actual_visit_count AS actualVisitCount, v.actual_visit_time AS actualVisitTime, v.opportunity_code AS opportunityCode, v.return_signer AS returnSigner, v.return_time AS returnTime, v.status AS visitStatus, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM eh_visit_photo p WHERE p.visit_id = v.id AND p.del_flag = '0') AS photoCount FROM eh_apply a LEFT JOIN eh_visit_record v ON v.apply_id = a.id AND v.del_flag = '0' WHERE a.del_flag = '0' AND a.status IN ('2', '5') ORDER BY a.start_time DESC

SELECT a.subject AS title, a.visitor_company AS unit, a.visitor_count AS headCount, a.industry AS industry, v.our_leader_level AS ourLeaderLevel, v.actual_visit_count AS actualVisitCount, COALESCE(v.actual_visit_time, a.start_time) AS visitTime, v.opportunity_code AS opportunityCode, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM eh_visit_photo p WHERE p.visit_id = v.id AND p.del_flag = '0') AS photoCount, v.return_signer AS returnSigner, v.return_time AS returnTime, v.status AS visitStatus FROM eh_apply a LEFT JOIN eh_visit_record v ON v.apply_id = a.id AND v.del_flag = '0' WHERE a.del_flag = '0' AND a.status IN ('2', '5') ORDER BY COALESCE(v.actual_visit_time, a.start_time) DESC
